story.title: Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you)

draft:
I just read about a developer who's calling out apps that are essentially webpages in disguise. 
He's created a tool to identify and convert them into actual webpages. 
This raises questions about app development and user experience. 
What's the real benefit of a native app over a webpage? 
#softwaredevelopment #appdesign #webdevelopment
